full_text:
Zuo Xi (Yanyong) 左熹 (彥雍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuo Xi (左熹), styledYanyong (彥雍). Worked himself up from low rank. His children became noted writers. Zuo Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
